name: Banxa
description: Compliant fiat-to-crypto gateway API for exchanges, wallets, and Web3 applications.

seo.title: Banxa — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Banxa: Compliant fiat-to-crypto gateway API for exchanges, wallets, and Web3 applications.

when_to_use: Fiat on-ramp for crypto exchanges and Web3 wallets in compliant markets
Adding buy-crypto flow to wallet app with KYC handled by Banxa
Enabling local payment methods (SEPA, card, bank) for crypto purchases
Regulatory-compliant fiat gateway API for DeFi and NFT platforms

cons: Payment method mix varies by country
review.verdict: Mature on-ramp provider for crypto products needing compliant fiat rails without building licensing themselves.
review.best_for: Exchanges, wallets, and Web3 apps embedding fiat purchase flows
review.not_for: Traditional e-commerce merchants with no crypto component
